driAgentAgumon.title: Agumon (DRI Johann)
driAgentAgumon.description: Add Agumon to your Digimon party

requisites.partyLevel: Have a party level between 30 and 45

1.description: Look for Dri Johann in Tyranno Valley

2.description: Defeat MetalGreymon in battle to receive Agumon's DDNA

3.description: Deliver Agumon's DNA to DRI Johann
